no_translation.label: No Translation
no_translation.description: Queries passed directly to Tantivy without Arabic expansion

raw_bm25.label: Raw BM25
raw_bm25.description: Translation enabled but no custom scoring adjustments

translation_only.label: Translation Only
translation_only.description: Only query translation, no scoring adjustments

scoring_only.label: Scoring Only
scoring_only.description: No phrase/variant expansion, but custom scoring enabled

with_stemmer.label: Full + Stemmer
with_stemmer.description: Full system plus Arabic morphological expansion
